message:
test(proptest): add 69 serde roundtrip tests for robot_types.rs uncovered types

Covers all remaining uncovered Serialize+Deserialize types in robot_types.rs:
BatchGetTextData, StateWithTextData, SearchData, ExplainedSearchHit,
SearchExplainData, SearchPipelineStatusData, SearchMetricsData,
SearchIndexReindexData, EventsData, EventWouldHandle, EventMutationData,
AgentInventoryData, InstalledAgentInfo, RunningAgentInfo,
AgentConfigureData/DryRunData/PlanItem/ResultItem, MissionStateData,
MissionDecisionData/DecisionsData, MissionAssignmentData,
TxPreconditionData, TxCompensatingActionData, TxRiskSummaryData,
TxRejectedEdgeData, TxStepData, TxPlanData, TxStepRecordData,
TxRunData, TxResumeData, TxRollbackData, TxTimelineEntryData, TxShowData,
WorkflowListData, WorkflowStatusData/ListData/DetailData, WorkflowAbortData,
WorkflowStepLog, WorkflowActionPlan, RulesListData, RuleItem, RulesTestData,
RuleMatchItem, RuleTraceInfo, RuleDetailData, RulesLintData, FixtureCoverage,
AccountsListData, AccountPickPreview, AccountQuotaAdvisoryInfo,
AccountsRefreshData, ReserveData, ReleaseData, ReservationsListData,
WhyData, ApproveData, QuickStartData and all QuickStart subtypes.

Total: 135 tests (was 66). Supports ft-3681t.4.1 quality gate Q1.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
